author: śrīla viśvanātha cakrabartī ṭhākura
verses:
gāṅgeya⋅cāmpeya⋅taḍid⋅vinindi⋅
rociḥ⋅pravāha⋅snapitātmavṛnde!
bandhūka⋅bandhu⋅dyuti⋅divyavāso
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

bimbādharoditvara⋅mandahāsya⋅
nāsāgra⋅muktādyuti⋅dīpitāsye!
vicitra⋅ratnābharaṇāśriyāḍhye!
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

samasta⋅vaikuṇṭha⋅śiromaṇau śrī⋅
kṛṣṇasya vṛndāvana⋅dhanya⋅dhāmni
dattādhikāre vṛṣabhānu⋅putryā
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

tvadājñayā pallava⋅puṣpa⋅bhṛṅga⋅
mṛgādibhirmādhava⋅keli⋅kuñjāḥ
madhvādibhirbhānti vibhūṣyamāṇā
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

tvadīya⋅dūtyena nikuñja⋅yūnoḥ⋅
ratyutkayoḥ keli⋅vilāsa⋅siddhiḥ
tvatsaubhagaṁ kena nirucyatāṁ tad
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

rāsābhilāṣo vasatiśca vṛndā⋅
vane tvadīśāṅghri⋅saroja⋅sevā
labhyā ca puṁsāṁ kṛpayā tavaiva
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

tvaṁ kīrtyase sātvata⋅tantravidbhi⋅
rlīlābhidhānā kila kṛṣṇa⋅śaktiḥ
tavaiva mūrtistulasī nṛloke
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

bhaktyā vihīnā aparādha⋅lakṣaiḥ
kṣiptāśca kāmādi⋅taraṅga⋅madhye
kṛpāmayi! tvāṁ śaraṇaṁ prapannā
vṛnde! numaste caraṇāravindam

vṛndāṣṭakaṁ jaḥ śṛṇuyāt paṭhed vā
vṛndāvanādhīśa⋅padābja⋅bhṛṅgaḥ
sa prāpya vṛndāvana⋅nitya⋅vāsaṁ
tat⋅prema⋅sevāṁ labhate kṛtārthaḥ
en_translation:
O Vṛndā Devī! Your inner self is bathed by a stream of splendor that surpasses gold, jasmine flowers, and lightning! O You whose divine garments possess the effulgence of a red flower! O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! Your gentle smile emanates from lips like a red fruit, and Your face is illuminated by the luster of the pearls on the tip of Your nose. O You who are enriched by the beauty of various jeweled ornaments! O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! You have been given authority by the daughter of Vṛṣabhānu in Lord Kṛṣṇa's most fortunate abode, Vṛndāvana, which is the crest jewel of all the spiritual planets! O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! By Your order, the pleasure groves of Kṛṣṇa are splendidly decorated with tender leaves, flowers, bees, deer, honey, and other things! O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! By Your ambassadorship, the playful pastimes of the very eager young couple, Rādhā and Kṛṣṇa, in the groves are perfected! Who can describe Your great fortune? O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! The desire for the rāsa dance, residence in Vṛndāvana, and service to the lotus feet of Your Lord are all attainable by people only by Your mercy! O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! You are glorified by those who know the scriptures as the energy of Kṛṣṇa named Līlā! Indeed, Your very form is Tulasi in the human world. O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

O Vṛndā Devī! We who are devoid of devotion, assailed by millions of offenses and thrown into the midst of the waves of lust and other material desires, have taken shelter of You, O merciful one! O Vṛndā Devī, I offer obeisances to Your lotus feet.

Whoever hears or reads these eight verses glorifying Vṛndā becomes a bee at the lotus feet of the Lord of Vṛndāvana. He attains eternal residence in Vṛndāvana and, having achieved his goal, attains loving devotional service to Him.
